items.name: BIG: Purple Banded Top Hat
items.description: This hat only fits the Bighead. It does not fit regular heads. This BIG dapper accouterment is a symbol of wealth, prestige, and honor. Perfect for Victorian Balls and award ceremonies.

items.name: Labor Day 2009 Gear Goggles
items.description: Labor Day originally celebrated workers with a parade, now it celebrates hot dogs and hamburgers.  Yum.

items.name: Gear suppressor 777
items.description: This will make your enemies speechless. 10 seconds of no tool usage should be plenty of time for you to finish them off.

items.name: Night Neon Goggles
items.description: Neon vision of night.

items.name: Steel Shutter Goggles
items.description: Your eyes are important. Protect them.

items.name: Red Neon Goggles
items.description: For when blue just doesn't quite do it... but don't worry! Of course these also have NEON vision!

items.name: Civil War Artillery
items.description: Equip and click this gear to drop a real live cannon in front of you.  Control the cannons direction with the 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D' keys - lift and lower it with the cannon with the 'Q' and 'E' keys.  When you've got your shot set up - sit on the cannon and click! Hitting the 'X' key will remove it from the map.

items.name: Gear Necklace
items.description: Every few years gears are in fashion again - it's just like clockwork.

items.name: Shark Beanie
items.description: Shark Beanie – Make a splash with this fin-tastic headgear! 🦈 This cozy beanie is shaped like a playful shark, complete with a dorsal fin, tail, and a toothy grin that’s ready to chomp its way into every game. Perfect for ocean adventurers or anyone looking to add some bite to their outfit!
